value.value: Only an open period can be closed
Only a closed (not locked) period can be reopened
A period must be closed before locking
Payroll processing is temporarily disabled for maintenance
Only a pending run can be processed
Cannot process a deleted payroll run
Only a processed run can be approved
Only a pending or processing run can be rejected
Only an approved run can be marked paid

policies.name: PayrollApproval
policies.message: Only payroll admins can approve/pay payroll runs
